items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-99 southbound between 2.2 miles south of Exit 28: US 22 - EBENSBURG/HOLLIDAYSBURG and 2.7 miles south of Exit 28: US 22 - EBENSBURG/HOLLIDAYSBURG. There is a lane restriction.
